messages.content: You generate TypeScript ts-viper sidecar contract clauses. Return only JSON shaped as {"clauses":["ensures(..., \"comment\")", "requires(..., \"comment\")"]}.

response.content: {"clauses":["requires(Number.isInteger(ruleCount), \"rule count is integral\")","requires(ruleCount >= 0, \"rule count is non-negative\")","ensures(implies(ruleCount <= 0, result<RequestedPermissionScopeDecision>() === \"reject-empty\"), \"empty rule sets are rejected\")","ensures(implies(ruleCount > 0 && !firstEnvIsNonEmptyString, result<RequestedPermissionScopeDecision>() === \"reject-env\"), \"missing environment is rejected\")","ensures(implies(ruleCount > 0 && firstEnvIsNonEmptyString && !firstPathIsNonEmptyString, result<RequestedPermissionScopeDecision>() === \"reject-path\"), \"missing path is rejected\")","ensures(implies(ruleCount > 0 && firstEnvIsNonEmptyString && firstPathIsNonEmptyString && !allRulesShareScope, result<RequestedPermissionScopeDecision>() === \"reject-mixed-scope\"), \"mixed scopes are rejected\")","ensures(implies(ruleCount > 0 && firstEnvIsNonEmptyString && firstPathIsNonEmptyString && allRulesShareScope, result<RequestedPermissionScopeDecision>() === \"accept\"), \"complete shared scope is accepted\")"]}

message.content: {"clauses":["requires(Number.isInteger(ruleCount), \"rule count is integral\")","requires(ruleCount >= 0, \"rule count is non-negative\")","ensures(implies(ruleCount <= 0, result<RequestedPermissionScopeDecision>() === \"reject-empty\"), \"empty rule sets are rejected\")","ensures(implies(ruleCount > 0 && !firstEnvIsNonEmptyString, result<RequestedPermissionScopeDecision>() === \"reject-env\"), \"missing environment is rejected\")","ensures(implies(ruleCount > 0 && firstEnvIsNonEmptyString && !firstPathIsNonEmptyString, result<RequestedPermissionScopeDecision>() === \"reject-path\"), \"missing path is rejected\")","ensures(implies(ruleCount > 0 && firstEnvIsNonEmptyString && firstPathIsNonEmptyString && !allRulesShareScope, result<RequestedPermissionScopeDecision>() === \"reject-mixed-scope\"), \"mixed scopes are rejected\")","ensures(implies(ruleCount > 0 && firstEnvIsNonEmptyString && firstPathIsNonEmptyString && allRulesShareScope, result<RequestedPermissionScopeDecision>() === \"accept\"), \"complete shared scope is accepted\")"]}

raw_clauses: ensures(implies(ruleCount > 0 && firstEnvIsNonEmptyString && firstPathIsNonEmptyString && !allRulesShareScope, result<RequestedPermissionScopeDecision>() === "reject-mixed-scope"), "mixed scopes are rejected")

ensures(implies(ruleCount > 0 && firstEnvIsNonEmptyString && firstPathIsNonEmptyString && allRulesShareScope, result<RequestedPermissionScopeDecision>() === "accept"), "complete shared scope is accepted")
